scripts.name: The Ruby Tower: Reclaim the Red Crystal
scripts.description: Fight your way through Ruby Tower, defeat the Grand Archmage on the top floor, and claim the Red Crystal.

steps.title: Clear First Floor of Ruby Tower
steps.description: Defeat all mages on First Floor.

steps.title: Clear Second Floor of Ruby Tower
steps.description: Defeat all mages on Second Floor.

steps.title: Clear Third Floor of Ruby Tower
steps.description: Defeat all mages on Third Floor.

steps.title: Clear Fourth Floor of Ruby Tower
steps.description: Defeat all mages on Fourth Floor.

steps.title: Defeat the Grand Archmage
steps.description: Defeat the Grand Archmage at the top of Ruby Tower and claim the Red Crystal.

steps.title: Claim the Red Crystal
steps.description: Take the Red Crystal from the defeated Grand Archmage.

scripts.name: The Stolen Grimoire
scripts.description: Recover the stolen fire grimoire from the bandits east of the tower.

steps.title: The Stolen Grimoire
steps.description: Recover the stolen fire grimoire from the bandits east of the tower.

scripts.name: Amber Dust Collection
scripts.description: Gather 5 vials of amber dust from the cave creatures to the north.

steps.title: Amber Dust Collection
steps.description: Gather 5 vials of amber dust from the cave creatures to the north.

scripts.name: The Shattered Lens
scripts.description: Find the three shards of the solar focusing lens scattered in the ruins.

steps.title: The Shattered Lens
steps.description: Find the three shards of the solar focusing lens scattered in the ruins.

scripts.name: Nature's Reagents
scripts.description: Harvest 7 moonleaf herbs from the forest glade south of the tower.

steps.title: Nature's Reagents
steps.description: Harvest 7 moonleaf herbs from the forest glade south of the tower.

scripts.name: The Flooded Lab
scripts.description: Drain the flooded basement by defeating the water elemental inside.

steps.title: The Flooded Lab
steps.description: Drain the flooded basement by defeating the water elemental inside.

scripts.name: Void Rift Closures
scripts.description: Close 4 void rifts that have opened around the tower perimeter.

steps.title: Void Rift Closures
steps.description: Close 4 void rifts that have opened around the tower perimeter.

scripts.name: The Missing Familiar
scripts.description: Find and rescue the shadow cat familiar that escaped into the dark forest.

steps.title: The Missing Familiar
steps.description: Find and rescue the shadow cat familiar that escaped into the dark forest.

scripts.name: Holy Water Blessing
scripts.description: Carry the vial of blessed water to all 5 shrines surrounding the Ivory Tower.

steps.title: Holy Water Blessing
steps.description: Carry the vial of blessed water to all 5 shrines surrounding the Ivory Tower.

scripts.name: The Forbidden Tome
scripts.description: Retrieve the forbidden tome from the graveyard before it corrupts the area.

steps.title: The Forbidden Tome
steps.description: Retrieve the forbidden tome from the graveyard before it corrupts the area.

scripts.name: The Crystal Convergence
scripts.description: Collect all nine colored crystals from the nine mage towers and unite them in the Tower of Convergence.

steps.title: Obtain the Red Crystal
steps.description: Clear Ruby Tower and collect the Red Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the Orange Crystal
steps.description: Clear Amber Tower and collect the Orange Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the Yellow Crystal
steps.description: Clear Solar Tower and collect the Yellow Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the Green Crystal
steps.description: Clear Emerald Tower and collect the Green Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the Blue Crystal
steps.description: Clear Sapphire Tower and collect the Blue Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the Indigo Crystal
steps.description: Clear Mystic Tower and collect the Indigo Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the Violet Crystal
steps.description: Clear Amethyst Tower and collect the Violet Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the White Crystal
steps.description: Clear Ivory Tower and collect the White Crystal.

steps.title: Obtain the Black Crystal
steps.description: Clear Obsidian Tower and collect the Black Crystal.

steps.title: Place All Nine Crystals in the Altar
steps.description: Travel to the Tower of Convergence and place all nine crystals in the Grand Altar.
